MTA's fuel hedging program manages Ultra-Low Sulfur Diesel (ULSD) hedges

records.display_name: 79th Street SBS Capital Project, Manhattan

description: Transit and pedestrian safety improvements along 79th Street from Riverside Drive to the FDR Drive. Follows up on NYC DOT's 2017 Street Improvement Project for M79 Select Bus Service. Includes bus bulbs, upgraded bus stops, new bus pads, updated ADA elements, curb extensions, improved median pedestrian refuges, refurbished sidewalks, stormwater infiltration basins, and new landscaping.
Capital project aiming to improve bus speeds, reliability, and pedestrian safety through street design treatments along 79th Street
Capital project to improve bus speeds, reliability, and pedestrian safety along 79th Street with treatments including bus bulbs, curb extensions, bus pads, and pedestrian islands

The 79th Street SBS capital project will build upon the improvements made for the 2017 M79 SBS launch, with the goals of further improving bus speeds, reliability, and pedestrian safety through the construction of new street elements along the M79 SBS route. Treatments will include bus bulbs, curb extensions, pedestrian islands, and bus pads.

payload.description: Transit and pedestrian safety improvements along 79th Street from Riverside Drive to the FDR Drive. Follows up on NYC DOT's 2017 Street Improvement Project for M79 Select Bus Service. Includes bus bulbs, upgraded bus stops, new bus pads, updated ADA elements, curb extensions, improved median pedestrian refuges, refurbished sidewalks, stormwater infiltration basins, and new landscaping.
